revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Bare URL inline]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
1 revision imported: Fixing my edit mistake that put this category on numerous templates it did not belong on
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed fixed]]</noinclude>"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed fixed]]" to "[[Category:templates to do mass undos on]]"

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects B]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects B]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Bare URL inline}} begin-->{{Fix | name = {{{name|Bare-inline}}} | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Bare URLs | text = bare URL | title = {{{reason|A full citation is required to prevent link rot.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat =
| cat-date = Category:Articles with bare URLs for citations }}<!--{{Bare URL inline}} end-->}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>{{Draft categories|
[[Category:All articles with bare URLs for citations]] }}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Bare URL inline}} begin-->{{Fix | name = {{{name|Bare-inline}}} | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Bare URLs | text = bare URL | title = {{{reason|A full citation is required to prevent link rot.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat =
| cat-date = Category:Articles with bare URLs for citations }}<!--{{Bare URL inline}} end-->}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

[[Category:All articles with bare URLs for citations]] }}</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bare_URL_inline here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bare_URL_inline for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Bare URL inline}} begin-->{{Fix | name = {{{name|Bare-inline}}} | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Bare URLs | text = bare URL | title = {{{reason|A full citation is required to prevent link rot.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat =
| cat-date = Category:Articles with bare URLs for citations }}<!--{{Bare URL inline}} end-->}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>{{Draft categories|
[[Category:All articles with bare URLs for citations]] }} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
